note_main_file: id=50 Improved Power Word: Shield (spec_tree=-1) — Disc tier 5, should eventually be spec_tree=0.
id=53 Improved Flash Heal (spec_tree=-1) — Disc tier 7, should eventually be spec_tree=0.
Both are already in talent_affixes.json; those entries are NOT duplicated here.
note_bit_sharing: Priest spells may share bits similar to Rogue bit-23 issue.
All specific-spell entries use all-ones as TEMP placeholder until .spellinfo verification.
After verification: use only unique identifying bits, OR'd for multi-spell entries.
Run '.spellinfo all <spell_id>' in-game and read SpellFamilyFlags hex → convert to decimal.

priority_2_spot_checks: .spellinfo all 17    -- Power Word: Shield (spot-check main-file id=50)
priority_3_multi_spell: .spellinfo all 2061  -- Flash Heal (id=148 Renewed Hope; also spot-checks main-file id=53)

talent_affixes._todo: Unbreakable Will (5r, tier 1) — Reduces duration of Stun/Fear/Silence/Polymorph/Banish by 6%/rank. Mechanic resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Twin Disciplines
talent_affixes.notes: Instant spell damage+healing +1%/rank. All-ones matches every Priest spell.

talent_affixes.name: Silent Resolve
talent_affixes.notes: Spell threat -20%/rank. All-ones matches every Priest spell.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Inner Fire
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2,0,0]: Inner Fire mask0 bit1(0x2=2). Exclude mask2=1024 — shared by PW:Shield/PW:Fortitude/Cure Disease/Abolish Disease. EFFECT1=armor bonus. +15%/rank.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Mana Burn
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[16,0,0]: Mana Burn mask0 bit4(0x10=16). No shared bits. Cast time -250ms/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Meditation (3r, tier 3) — Allows 10/20/30% mana regen to continue while casting. Regeneration system mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.
Inner Focus (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Power Word: Fortitude
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[8,0,0]: PW:Fortitude mask0 bit3(0x8=8). Exclude mask2=1024 — shared. EFFECT1=stamina value. +15%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Martyrdom (2r, tier 4) — Proc-based: after being hit, gain reduced threat and crit chance bonus. Requires hit-taken trigger, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Absolution
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,1,0]: Dispel Magic(988) mask1 bit0(1) | Cure Disease(528) mask1 bit0(1) | Abolish Disease(552) mask1 bit0(1) — all confirmed. mask2=1024 excluded (shared Priest marker). Cost -5%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Power Infusion (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Mental Agility
talent_affixes.notes: Instant spell mana cost -2%/rank. All-ones is slightly broader than just instants but acceptable.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Power Word: Shield
talent_affixes.notes: Power Word: Shield absorb +5% per rank — flags confirmed: 0x1=1 (mask0 bit0). Exclude mask2=1024 (shared Priest marker).

talent_affixes._todo: Mental Strength (5r, tier 5) — Increases Intellect by 3%/rank. Passive stat bonus, not a SpellMod.
Soul Warding (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Focused Power
talent_affixes.notes: Damage and healing done +2%/rank. All-ones matches every Priest spell.

talent_affixes._todo: Enlightenment (3r, tier 6) — Increases Spirit, haste, and crit strike chance. Passive multi-stat bonus, not SpellMod.
Focused Will (2r, tier 7) — Proc-based: after being critically hit, increases crit chance by 3%/rank. Requires hit-taken trigger, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Renewed Hope
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[6144,8388608,0]: Flash Heal(2061) mask0 bit11(0x800=2048) | Greater Heal(2060) mask0 bit12(0x1000=4096)=6144; Penance(47540) mask1 bit23(0x800000=8388608). Crit +4%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 400=4%).

talent_affixes.name: Improved Flash Heal
talent_affixes.notes: Flash Heal mana cost -3% per rank — flags confirmed: 0x00000800=2048 (mask0 bit11).

talent_affixes._todo: Rapture (5r, tier 8) — Mana return when PW:Shield is fully absorbed or dispelled. Complex proc mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Aspiration
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2147483648,805310464,0]: PS(33206) mask0 bit31(0x80000000=2147483648)|mask1(0x10001000=268439552); PI(10060) mask0 bit31|mask1(0x20001000=536875008). OR: mask0=2147483648, mask1=0x30001000=805310464. Exclude mask2=1024 (shared Priest marker). Inner Focus(89)=SPELLFAMILY_GENERIC — cannot be targeted by Priest SpellMod, excluded entirely. Cooldown -15%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Borrowed Time (5r, tier 9) — After casting PW:Shield, reduces cast time of next spell by 5%/rank. Proc-based next-spell modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Divine Aegis (3r, tier 9) — After a critical heal, create absorb shield for 10/20/30% of heal amount. Proc-based absorb, not implementable as SpellMod.
Pain Suppression (1r, tier 9) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Grace (2r, tier 10) — Healing a target with Flash Heal/Greater Heal/Penance reduces damage they take by 1%/rank (stacking up to 3). Proc-based stacking mitigation, not SpellMod.
Penance (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent (also a channeled spell), excluded by design.
